title: Silent Payments
description: Silent payments let receivers publish one static address while each payment still lands in a unique on-chain output. This reduces address reuse while keeping receiver-side scanning requirements manageable.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the wallet, transaction, and protocol ideas that support this topic.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts Tag: Silent payments
resources.notes: Implementation-oriented talks on scanning and address UX.

resources.title: BIP 352 Draft
resources.notes: Specification draft for silent payment address and spend flow.
